definitions.definition: An organ that constitutes the external surface of the body. It consists of the epidermis, dermis, and skin appendages.
An organ that constitutes the external surface of the body. It consists of the epidermis, dermis, and skin appendages. (NCI)
The organ covering the body that consists of the dermis and epidermis.
